overall.description: A first-person walkthrough of a cyberpunk city plaza at night, transitioning from ground level with neon-lit shops to an upper pedestrian walkway. The footage is from a video game (Cyberpunk 2077), featuring vibrant cyan and magenta neon lighting, futuristic architecture, and sparse pedestrian NPCs.

scene_state.functional_zone: open pedestrian plaza with neon shops and escalator

events.description: turns right to circle around the noodle shop kiosk

agents.ego_description: walking through the plaza and observing the neon-lit surroundings

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking across the plaza toward the escalator

entered.detail: small kiosk with purple neon trim and Japanese signage
tall escalator with illuminated edges leading to upper level
tall structure with multiple digital screens displaying advertisements
rectangular structure with bright orange panels near the crosswalk

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a wide cyberpunk plaza at night, illuminated by vibrant neon signs. The camera moves through the open space, passing a purple-lit noodle shop on the left and approaching a large escalator structure in the center. Sparse pedestrians walk through the plaza as the camera circles the shop.

scene_state.functional_zone: illuminated staircase between plaza and upper walkway

events.description: enters the covered stairwell from the open plaza
begins ascending the stairs with neon light strips

agents.ego_description: climbing the illuminated stairs to reach the upper pedestrian level

entered.detail: concrete stairs with continuous white neon light strips along the edges
metal handrail with embedded cyan lighting

segments.scene_description: The camera enters a narrow stairwell, leaving the open plaza behind. It ascends concrete stairs illuminated by continuous white neon strips along the edges, transitioning from the ground level to the upper walkway.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated walkway with glass railing overlooking the street

events.description: exits stairwell onto the upper covered walkway with city views
passes by NPCs sitting on illuminated benches overlooking the street

agents.ego_description: walking along the upper level and looking out at the city view through the glass railing

notable_agents.action: two people sitting on a glowing cyan bench looking at the street view

entered.detail: covered pedestrian bridge with reflective flooring and overhead lighting
transparent barrier overlooking the street level with palm trees visible outside
futuristic seating with bright cyan underlighting
tropical trees visible through the glass overlooking the street
massive screen displaying TOPICREAM advertisement with red background

segments.scene_description: Emerging onto an elevated walkway, the camera moves along a glass railing overlooking the cyberpunk street below. Palm trees and massive digital billboards are visible through the windows. Two NPCs sit on a glowing cyan bench to the right, observing the city view.

scene_state.functional_zone: corridor with tobacco shop featuring pink neon lighting

events.description: passes the tobacco shop with bright pink neon OPEN sign and bamboo plants
turns slightly left while continuing down the corridor

agents.ego_description: walking past the tobacco shop and continuing through the neon-lit corridor

notable_agents.action: person standing near the tobacco shop window looking inside

entered.detail: storefront with pink neon OPEN sign and bamboo plants visible through barred windows
bright pink illuminated sign reading OPEN above the shop entrance
tall bamboo stalks inside the shop visible through the window bars
automated machines with glowing interfaces along the right wall
cylindrical information booth with multiple digital screens at the end of the corridor

segments.scene_description: The camera moves along a covered corridor, passing a striking tobacco shop bathed in pink neon light with bamboo plants visible through the barred windows. The walkway continues past vending machines toward a circular kiosk visible in the distance, while other pedestrians walk in the opposite direction.

scene_state.functional_zone: transit corridor with circular information kiosk

events.description: approaches the circular kiosk at the end of the corridor

agents.ego_description: walking toward the circular structure at the end of the walkway

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking ahead toward the circular kiosk

entered.detail: scattered debris and paper on the floor near the walkway edge

segments.scene_description: The final segment approaches a circular information kiosk at the end of the corridor. The camera moves closer to the cylindrical structure with its glowing digital displays, passing scattered litter on the floor while following another pedestrian ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a wide, neon-lit cyberpunk plaza up to an elevated pedestrian corridor overlooking the city. It begins by gliding through an open square past a purple-lit noodle shop before turning toward a central escalator structure. The camera then transitions from the open air into a narrow concrete stairwell, ascending via white neon strips that lead away from the ground level. Upon emerging onto the upper walkway, the view expands across a glass railing toward digital billboards and palm trees, passing NPCs on a glowing cyan bench before entering a covered corridor lined with pink-lit shops and vending machines. The movement finally concludes as the camera follows a pedestrian toward a cylindrical information kiosk with glowing digital displays at the end of the path.
